response: Unlike AST passes that transform before interpretation, interpreter optimizations leave the AST unchanged and short-circuit execution.
A macro body may call only macros declared earlier in flattened load order: from files it `use`s or earlier in the same file. Enforced at expansion via a declaration-time visibility snapshot.
`breakpoint` is currently bare: it fires and dumps raw tape state. With multiple breakpoints, you can't tell which fired or its source location.
Target: <0.1ms total software overhead on any latency-critical path (input, audio, rendering); hard limit: 1ms.
SPSC command queue overflow must be detectable so the scene can discard the affected measurement instead of silently producing invalid calibration data.
Per-thread SPSC lock-free queues: each logging thread writes to its own thread-local ring buffer with zero contention; a single backend thread polls all queues.
Runtime failures → clean shutdown. No hot recovery; user restarts. Acceptable for a calibration utility, not a long-running service.
Restating content the target LLM already knows or can infer from docs/code/READMEs increases reasoning tokens 10–22% without improving outcomes.
Every directive in always-included content competes for the LLM’s reasoning budget. Extra instructions increase tool calls, file traversal, and reasoning tokens, making tasks harder, not easier.
Grading = evaluating each assertion against actual outputs and recording PASS/FAIL with specific evidence quoting or referencing the output, not opinion.
Important nuance: agents typically consult skills only for tasks requiring knowledge or capabilities beyond what they can handle alone.

A separate test-writing agent gets only the spec—not function names, signatures, internal structure, or behavior lists inferred from code. The parent agent must not fill spec gaps by front-loading implementation knowledge into the prompt.
Specs prescribe behavior, but predicting whether an LLM will follow a spec is a false-belief task. Exams test spec effectiveness by running questions through actual LLM calls and observing output.
A valid test question must have one correct answer determined by an explicit, exceptionless rule; if a reasonable person could argue the opposite, it fails as a test.
SKILL.md is the only context file agents receive when the worklog skill activates. It must be self-contained: agents follow its methodology without reading individual specs.
Drift suppresses process compliance—governance checks, verification steps, archival procedures—by pushing required steps out of the agent’s active attention.

Injecting full context files (AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md) adds noise agents faithfully obey, empirically reducing success rates by ~3% and increasing cost >20%. Agents follow unnecessary requirements (style guides, architecture overviews) even when they hinder the task.
The Knowledge Base stores reusable text you can reference in templates, such as character descriptions, world details, or reference material.
skai-chat does not use tree-based history. Retrying generation mid-history changes only that point; later messages remain unchanged.

Prompt-engineering specialist subagent that offloads prompt reasoning from the main agent’s context window, letting it delegate prompt tasks without retaining prompt-engineering principles in context.
